login.signInDesc: Enter your credentials to access IronRAG.
login.initialSetupDesc: Configure the admin account and AI bindings for this instance.
login.providerAddressRequiredHint: Enter the provider endpoint before completing setup.
login.providerAddressFixedHint: This endpoint is fixed by the provider catalog.
login.providerTokenRequiredHint: Enter the provider token before completing setup.
login.tagline: An operator-grade knowledge system for document ingestion, structured extraction, and grounded AI reasoning.
login.featureDocsDesc: Ingest files and web pages. Track processing stages, monitor readiness, and inspect extracted structure.
login.featureEntitiesDesc: Extract typed technical facts, normalized values, and structured data from your documents.
login.featureGraphDesc: Build and explore a connected graph of documents, entities, topics, and their relations.
login.featureAiDesc: Ask questions answered from your library content with full evidence provenance.
login.purposeExtractTextDesc: Read source content and prepare document text for the ingestion pipeline
login.purposeExtractGraphDesc: Extract entities and relations from documents
login.purposeEmbedChunkDesc: Generate vector embeddings for document chunks
login.purposeQueryCompileDesc: Turn the user question into a typed IR plan that drives pipeline routing
login.purposeQueryRetrieveDesc: Retrieve the grounded context used to answer user questions
login.purposeQueryAnswerDesc: Answer questions grounded in library content
login.purposeVisionDesc: Process images and visual content in documents
login.purposeAgentDesc: Drive the UI assistant tool-loop: choose available MCP tools and synthesize the final answer
login.bundleConfiguredInEnv: API key is already configured in the environment.
login.bundleReadyPreview: The selected provider will be bootstrapped with ready-to-use presets.
login.noBootstrapBundles: No bootstrap provider bundles are available for the current provider catalog.
login.bootstrapBundleRequired: Select a ready AI provider bundle before completing setup.
login.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields
login.bootstrapStatusFetchFailed: Failed to load initial setup configuration

dashboard.noFailedDesc: There are no failed documents in this library right now.
dashboard.noAttentionDesc: No failed documents, stale rebuilds, or partial graph warnings are active right now.

attentionDetails.failed_documents: Some documents are currently failed in the active library and need operator review.

attentionDetails.graph_sparse: A small set of readable documents still lacks graph extraction.

attentionDetails.stale_vectors: Readable documents have not converged onto the current vector state yet.
attentionDetails.stale_relations: The graph is still behind the readable document set for this library.
attentionDetails.failed_rebuilds: At least one recent rebuild failed and needs review.
attentionDetails.bundle_assembly_failures: Recent bundle assembly failed and graph context may be incomplete.

documents.name: Name
documents.documentHintHelp: Provide a source URL or a short label and the AI will be able to mention where the information came from when citing this document. Leave blank to skip.
documents.documentHintTooltip: This hint is shown to the AI assistant and MCP agents when this document is cited in answers. It can be a source URL or a short human-readable label.

documents.editUnavailableProcessing: Finish processing before editing this document.
documents.editUnavailableFailed: Reprocess the document before opening the editor.
documents.editUnavailableGeneric: This document is not ready for editing yet.

editor.title: Document Editor
editor.description: Save creates a new markdown revision and reruns the processing pipeline.
editor.viewerDescription: Review the processed document content. This source format is read-only.
editor.unsavedHint: Save or close the editor when you finish reviewing the changes.
editor.loadFailed: Failed to load document into the editor
editor.codeModeHint: Code files keep a monospace workspace with scrollable long lines.
editor.tableScrollHint: Scroll inside the table to reach hidden columns.
editor.tableSelectionHint: Place the cursor inside a table before adding rows or columns.

byCode.docling_insufficient_memory: The document extractor (docling) ran out of memory in the worker container.
byCode.upload_extraction_failed: The file was accepted, but text or structured content could not be extracted from it.
byCode.unsupported_upload_type: This file type is not supported for document ingestion.
byCode.invalid_text_encoding: The file looks text-based, but its text encoding could not be read.
byCode.invalid_file_body: The uploaded file body could not be read completely.
byCode.multipart_stream_failure: The upload request stream could not be parsed completely.
byCode.upload_limit_exceeded: The upload is larger than the configured size limit.
byCode.missing_upload_file: The upload request did not include a file field.
byCode.children_failed: Some documents in the batch operation failed.
byCode.admit_failed: The batch operation could not queue every document for processing.
byCode.delete_failed: Some documents could not be deleted.
byCode.jobs_cancelled: The selected processing jobs were cancelled.
byCode.parser_failed: The document parser could not extract usable content.
byCode.preparation_failed: The document structure could not be prepared for indexing.
byCode.extraction_failed: Content extraction failed before indexing could continue.
byCode.reconcile_failed: The document state could not be reconciled after processing failed.
byCode.finalize_failed: The document could not be finalized after processing.
byCode.graph_failed: The graph update for this document failed.
byCode.mutation_failed: The document change could not be applied.
byCode.revision_hard_failed: The document revision ended in a terminal failure.
byCode.status_hard_failed: The document ended in a terminal failure state.
byCode.web_discovery_failed: The crawler could not discover pages from the source site.
byCode.web_materialize_page_failed: The captured web page could not be materialized for storage.
byCode.graph_extract_failed: The system could not extract entities and relations into the graph.
byCode.graph_reconcile_timeout: Graph reconciliation exceeded its time limit.
byCode.provider_timeout: The AI provider did not respond before the timeout.
byCode.upstream_timeout: An upstream service did not respond before the timeout.
byCode.inaccessible: The source is inaccessible or not responding.
byCode.unsupported_content: The source returned an unsupported content type.
byCode.lease_lost: The background worker lost its lease and stopped processing.
byCode.web_snapshot_persist_failed: The web page snapshot could not be saved.
byCode.web_snapshot_missing: The web page snapshot was not found.
byCode.web_snapshot_missing_final_url: The web page snapshot is missing its final URL.
byCode.web_snapshot_unavailable: The web page snapshot is unavailable.
byCode.web_capture_materialization_failed: The captured web page could not be materialized for storage.
byCode.recursive_crawl_failed: The recursive crawl failed before completion.
byCode.knowledge_context_bundle_failed: The system could not assemble the graph context bundle.
byCode.missing_stored_source: The document source file is missing from storage.
byCode.stored_source_unavailable: The source file could not be read.
byCode.shutdown_cancelled: Processing was interrupted due to service shutdown.
byCode.document_deleted: The document was deleted before processing completed.
byCode.graph_cleanup_failed: The graph could not be cleaned of stale document data.
byCode.graph_projection_failed: The graph projection could not be rebuilt.
byCode.batch_timeout: The batch operation exceeded the time limit.
byCode.ingest_job_admission_failed: The processing job could not be queued.
byCode.invalid_candidate_set: The model returned an invalid candidate set.

byStage.extract_content: Text could not be extracted from the document. Check the file and retry processing.
byStage.prepare_structure: The structured representation could not be prepared.
byStage.chunk_content: The document could not be split into segments.
byStage.embed_chunk: The segments could not be sent to embedding.
byStage.extract_technical_facts: Technical facts could not be extracted from the document.
byStage.extract_graph: The graph could not be updated from this document.
byStage.finalizing: The document could not be finalized.
byStage.web_discovery: The source site could not be crawled for pages.
byStage.web_materialize_page: The web page could not be loaded and stored.

documents.failureImpact: The document is not available for search or grounded answers until it is processed successfully.

failureActions.generic: Retry processing. If the same diagnostic code appears again, contact an administrator with the code and document ID.
failureActions.uploadGeneric: Retry the upload. If it keeps failing, upload the file individually or replace it with a clean exported copy.

byCode.canonical_pipeline_failed: Retry processing. If the same stage fails again, inspect the pipeline stage details and provider configuration.
byCode.docling_insufficient_memory: Raise the worker memory limit IRONRAG_WORKER_MEMORY_LIMIT (in docker-compose or helm values) and recreate the container: docker compose up -d --force-recreate worker. A single docling process needs ≥2560 MiB plus headroom.
byCode.upload_extraction_failed: Retry the upload or replace the file with a clean exported copy. If it keeps failing, use a supported source format with extractable text.
byCode.unsupported_upload_type: Upload a supported document format or convert the file before uploading.
byCode.invalid_text_encoding: Re-save the file with a standard text encoding or upload it in a format with a dedicated parser.
byCode.invalid_file_body: Retry the upload. If it keeps failing, upload the file individually to isolate the broken file body.
byCode.multipart_stream_failure: Retry the upload with a standard multipart/form-data request.
byCode.upload_limit_exceeded: Split the document or batch into smaller uploads, or ask an administrator to raise the upload limit.
byCode.missing_upload_file: Select a file and retry the upload.
byCode.children_failed: Open the failed documents in the batch, fix each document-level error, then retry only the failed items.
byCode.admit_failed: Retry the batch after the queue is healthy. If every item fails again, contact an administrator with the diagnostic code.
byCode.delete_failed: Refresh the list and retry deletion for the remaining documents.
byCode.jobs_cancelled: No fix is needed if cancellation was intentional. Retry processing if the document should be ingested.
byCode.parser_failed: Check that the file opens normally, then retry processing or upload a clean exported copy.
byCode.preparation_failed: Retry processing. If it repeats, inspect the extracted content and document structure.
byCode.extraction_failed: Retry processing or upload a clean exported copy of the document.
byCode.reconcile_failed: Refresh the document state and retry processing. If it repeats, contact an administrator with the diagnostic code.
byCode.finalize_failed: Retry processing after storage and graph services are healthy.
byCode.graph_failed: Retry processing after graph storage and the graph extraction provider are healthy.
byCode.job_failed: Retry processing. If jobs keep failing, check worker health.
byCode.attempt_failed: Retry processing. If attempts keep failing, inspect the latest pipeline stage.
byCode.async_operation_failed: Retry the operation. If it repeats, contact an administrator with the operation ID.
byCode.mutation_failed: Retry the document change. If it repeats, replace the document with a fresh upload.
byCode.revision_hard_failed: Retry processing or replace the document with a fresh upload.
byCode.status_hard_failed: Retry processing. If the terminal state repeats, contact an administrator with the diagnostic code.
byCode.web_discovery_failed: Check that the source URL is reachable and crawl boundaries are correct, then start the web ingest again.
byCode.web_materialize_page_failed: Check that the page can load, then start the web ingest again.
byCode.graph_extract_failed: Retry processing. If the provider failed repeatedly, check the graph extraction model binding and provider health.
byCode.graph_reconcile_timeout: Retry processing after the graph service is healthy. Large libraries may need a higher graph timeout.
byCode.provider_timeout: Retry after the provider is healthy or switch the active model binding to an available provider.
byCode.upstream_timeout: Retry after the upstream service is healthy.
byCode.invalid_url: Correct the URL and start the ingest again.
byCode.inaccessible: Check network access, authentication, and source availability, then retry.
byCode.unsupported_content: Use a source that returns a supported content type or upload the document directly.
byCode.timeout: Retry processing. If timeouts repeat, reduce document size or ask an administrator to increase the processing timeout.
byCode.lease_lost: Retry processing after the worker is healthy.
byCode.web_snapshot_persist_failed: Retry the web ingest after storage is healthy.
byCode.web_snapshot_missing: Start the web ingest again so the page snapshot can be captured.
byCode.web_snapshot_missing_final_url: Start the web ingest again and verify the source URL resolves normally.
byCode.web_capture_materialization_failed: Retry the web ingest. If it repeats, check whether the page can be loaded without browser errors.
byCode.recursive_crawl_failed: Review crawl boundaries and retry the crawl.
byCode.knowledge_context_bundle_failed: Retry processing. If it repeats, rebuild or inspect the graph context pipeline.
byCode.missing_stored_source: Replace the document or upload it again so the source file is stored.
byCode.stored_source_unavailable: Retry after storage is healthy, or replace the document with a fresh upload.
byCode.shutdown_cancelled: Retry processing after the service restart has completed.
byCode.document_deleted: No fix is needed for deleted documents.
byCode.inline_pipeline_failed: Retry processing and inspect the failed pipeline stage if it repeats.
byCode.graph_cleanup_failed: Retry after graph storage is healthy.
byCode.graph_projection_failed: Retry after graph storage is healthy.
byCode.batch_timeout: Retry a smaller batch or ask an administrator to increase the batch timeout.
byCode.ingest_job_admission_failed: Retry after the ingest queue is healthy.
byCode.ingest_stage_cancelled: Retry processing if cancellation was not intentional.
byCode.malformed_output: Retry processing. If it repeats, inspect the model binding for this pipeline stage.
byCode.invalid_candidate_set: Retry processing. If it repeats, inspect the graph extraction model binding.

byStage.extract_content: Check that the file is readable and retry processing or upload a clean exported copy.
byStage.prepare_structure: Retry processing. If it repeats, inspect the extracted text and document structure.
byStage.chunk_content: Retry processing. If it repeats, inspect the extracted text for malformed structure.
byStage.embed_chunk: Check the embedding provider binding and retry processing.
byStage.extract_technical_facts: Check the extraction provider binding and retry processing.
byStage.extract_graph: Check the graph extraction provider binding and retry processing.
byStage.verify_query_answer: Retry after the verifier provider is healthy.
byStage.finalizing: Retry processing after storage and graph services are healthy.
byStage.web_discovery: Check the source URL and crawl boundaries, then start web ingest again.
byStage.web_materialize_page: Check that the page can load, then start web ingest again.

documents.ingestionNotReadyDetail: Required AI bindings for document processing are not configured.
documents.detailColumnsHint: Show Cost / Pipeline / Finished columns (page-scoped sort)
documents.dropZoneHint: Or use the Add content button above

graph.title: Knowledge Graph
graph.subtitle: Entities, relations, and sources
graph.noGraphDesc: Upload and process documents to build the knowledge graph.
graph.noMatchingNodesDesc: Adjust filters to see more nodes.
graph.detailsFailed: Failed to load full node details.
graph.noConnections: No connections found for this node.
graph.noSources: No source documents found for this node.
graph.noLibraryDesc: Select a library to explore its knowledge graph.

layoutDescriptions.sectors: Node types are split into dedicated sectors so large graphs no longer collapse into a single ring.
layoutDescriptions.bands: Nodes are arranged in broad type bands. This is the primary view for dense graphs.
layoutDescriptions.components: Connected components are separated into distinct islands so clusters and gaps stay readable.
layoutDescriptions.rings: Node types are separated into concentric rings for a fast composition overview.
layoutDescriptions.clusters: Node types form separate clouds around the stage for broader visual exploration.
layoutDescriptions.hubs: High-degree nodes anchor local neighborhoods so the strongest graph signals are easy to scan.
layoutDescriptions.sources: Documents and knowledge nodes are separated into source-to-entity lanes for provenance review.
layoutDescriptions.flow: Nodes are layered by graph distance from source documents to expose evidence paths.
layoutDescriptions.radial: Important seeds own radial sectors, with nearby nodes closer to the center.
layoutDescriptions.circlepack: Node types are packed into compact circles for a dense overview.

graph.askAboutThisCopied: Query copied — paste into the assistant
graph.showDenseEdgesHint: Draw a denser edge sample while keeping interactions smooth
graph.showSampledEdgesHint: Drawing a sampled subset of edges for smoothness

assistant.title: AI Assistant
assistant.noSessionsDesc: Start a new conversation to ask questions.
assistant.askQuestionDesc: Answers are grounded in your library content.
assistant.noLibraryDesc: Select a library to start asking questions grounded in your documents.
assistant.queryNotConfiguredDesc: Configure the query_answer AI binding in Admin → AI to enable the assistant.

starterPrompts.keyPoints: What are the main facts to know here?
starterPrompts.openQuestions: Which questions remain unclear from the materials?
starterPrompts.recentItems: What matters in the latest documents?

assistant.debugInspectorEmpty: Open debug after an answer — context, messages, and tool calls will appear here.
assistant.debugInspectorNoContent: The latest answer has no recorded context or tool calls yet.
assistant.llmContextUnavailable: LLM context was not recorded for this execution.
assistant.stageTipCompile: NL question compiled into a typed query IR (act / scope / entities).
assistant.stageTipRetrieve: Vector + lexical + graph retrieval, reranking and context assembly.
assistant.stageTipAnswer: The grounded answer is generated from the assembled context.
assistant.stageTipVerify: The answer is checked against the evidence for unsupported claims.
assistant.stageTipPersist: The turn, citations and audit records are written to storage.
assistant.stageTipModelThink: Wall-clock the model spent generating this iteration.
assistant.stageTipToolWait: Wall-clock the agent blocked waiting for this tool to return.
assistant.mcpContextEmpty: Request context was not recorded for this execution.
assistant.mcpNoStageTelemetry: Stage telemetry not recorded. Only LLM iterations are available.
assistant.tooltipModelCall: Iteration {{iteration}} · Generation: {{think}} · In: {{tokIn}} tok · Out: {{tokOut}} tok

columnHelp.library: Library name and slug. Click a row to open its inspector.
columnHelp.workspace: Workspace that owns the library. Use this to separate identical library names across workspaces.
columnHelp.documents: Number of documents currently counted for this library.
columnHelp.cost: Total billed provider cost attributed to the library.
columnHelp.calls: Provider calls made while processing or answering from this library.
columnHelp.readiness: Whether the library has the required AI bindings to process documents and answer queries. Blocked means one or more required bindings are missing.
columnHelp.lifecycle: Operational state of the library record. Active libraries are usable; inactive libraries are retained but not in the normal active set.
columnHelp.actions: Quick actions for this library: open its documents, download a backup, or delete it.

libraries.openDocumentsFailed: This library is not available in the current document scope.
libraries.inspectorEmpty: Select a library to inspect it.
libraries.deleteDesc: Deletion is asynchronous and removes the selected libraries with their documents, graph data, assistant sessions, and ingest state.
libraries.deleteDesc_one: Deletion is asynchronous and removes the selected library with its documents, graph data, assistant sessions, and ingest state.
libraries.deleteDesc_few: Deletion is asynchronous and removes the selected libraries with their documents, graph data, assistant sessions, and ingest state.
libraries.deleteDesc_many: Deletion is asynchronous and removes the selected libraries with their documents, graph data, assistant sessions, and ingest state.
libraries.deleteDesc_other: Deletion is asynchronous and removes the selected libraries with their documents, graph data, assistant sessions, and ingest state.

mcp.includeDocumentHint: Include source hints in MCP answers
mcp.includeDocumentHintHelp: When enabled, MCP agents receive a source hint with every citation.

admin.languageDesc: Select the display language for the application.
admin.selectLibraryOps: Select a library to view operations.

snapshot.importAccepted: Archive uploaded. Restore is running in the background.
snapshot.importTimeout: Restore is still running. Check operations again in a few minutes.
snapshot.exportDesc: A tar.zst archive with everything the library owns. Download starts in your browser.
snapshot.importDesc: Upload a previously created tar.zst archive.
snapshot.libraryDataDesc: Documents, revisions, chunks, graph nodes and edges, knowledge base — everything needed to rebuild the library 1:1. Always included.
snapshot.includeBlobsDesc: Original uploads stored by the library. Significantly grows archive size — leave off if you only need graph and search data.
snapshot.includeWorkspaceDesc: The owning workspace row, so a restore on a clean stack recreates the workspace this library lives in.
snapshot.includeAiConfigDesc: Provider and model catalogs, prices, AI accounts (without API keys) and binding assignments. Import never overwrites the target's existing AI configuration.
snapshot.overwriteReplaceWarn: Replace will delete the current library data before applying the archive. Make sure the archive is correct.

admin.queueEmpty: There are no active ingest jobs.
admin.queueBulkCancelFailed: Failed to cancel selected ingest jobs
admin.queueBulkPauseFailed: Failed to pause selected ingest jobs
admin.queueBulkResumeFailed: Failed to resume selected ingest jobs
admin.queueResumeBlocked: Resume is available after the worker stops the current attempt.
admin.queueInspectorEmpty: Select a job to inspect current processing activity.
admin.queueInspectorNoAttempt: The job has not been claimed by a worker yet.
admin.queueInspectorNoEvents: No stage events have been recorded for this attempt yet.
admin.mcpScopeNote: Clients connect with a bearer token from the Access section. Which libraries an MCP client can reach is set by the token's scope — system, a workspace, or a set of libraries — not a single library.
admin.mcpSystemPromptDesc: System prompt for external MCP agents such as Claude Desktop, Codex, Cursor, Continue.dev, OpenClaw, and Hermes. The in-app assistant uses the same text.
admin.mcpParityDesc: The built-in assistant uses the same system prompt and the same read-only MCP tools as external agents: catalog, documents, graph, runtime diagnostics, and grounded_answer.
admin.createTokenDesc: Create a new token for API access.
admin.deleteTokenDesc: Delete revoked token “{{label}}” from the access panel. Active tokens must be revoked before deletion.
admin.tokenWorkspaceDesc: Token access is limited to this workspace.
admin.tokenLibrariesDesc: Select one or more libraries inside the chosen workspace.
admin.tokenNoLibrariesAvailable: No libraries are available in the selected workspace.
admin.tokenNoPermissions: No permissions are attached to this token.
admin.tokenRequiresWorkspace: Select a workspace before creating a token.
admin.tokenCreatedDesc: Copy this token now. You won't be able to see it again.
admin.label: Label
admin.pricingOverrideDescription: Pricing overrides are stored for the current workspace and replace the system catalog price.
admin.deletePricingOverrideDescription: Delete the pricing override for {{model}}? The system catalog price will be used again.

opsStatusDescriptions.healthy: The queue is clear and no active failures are visible.
opsStatusDescriptions.processing: New or retried documents are still moving through the processing queue.
opsStatusDescriptions.rebuilding: Documents are readable, but vectors or graph state are still catching up.
opsStatusDescriptions.degraded: Some documents or rebuild jobs failed and need operator review.
opsStatusDescriptions.empty: This library has no readable documents yet, so knowledge generation has not run.

notices.missingInstanceBaseline: No instance baseline is configured yet. You are viewing the nearest scope that already has AI settings. Set instance defaults when you want one account/binding stack shared by every workspace and library.

empty.noSelectableModels: No selectable models are available yet. Save a reachable account first and make sure the model is present on the configured provider.
